name: machine-counter
description: Pulse counter using the ESP32 PCNT (Pulse Counter) peripheral. Counts rising/falling edges on GPIO pins. Used for flow meters, frequency measurement, and event counting.
differences_from_cpython: Does NOT exist in CPython. MicroPython-specific ESP32 pulse counter.

classes.name: Counter

constructor_params.name: edge
constructor_params.description: Counter.RISING (1) or Counter.FALLING (2). Which edge to count.

classes.example:
from machine import Pin, Counter
import time

# Count pulses on GPIO 4
cnt = Counter(Pin(4), edge=Counter.RISING)
print('Count:', cnt.value())  # current count
time.sleep(5)
print('Count after 5s:', cnt.value())
cnt.value(0)  # reset to zero

esp32_notes: For quadrature rotary encoders, use machine.Encoder instead.
